Our Strengths

WHY KANPUR TRUSTS RAJ IRON SHOP

21 Years of Trust
Established in February 2003 in Kanpur. Two decades of consistently delivering quality steel to builders, contractors, and manufacturers across Uttar Pradesh.
GST Verified Supplier
Fully registered and compliant. Every transaction is transparent, documented, and GST-invoiced — the gold standard for contractors and procurement teams.
GSTIN: 09AISPG7202J1ZZ
Wholesale to Retail
We serve everyone — from large-scale contractors placing bulk orders to individual project builders buying a few pieces. Same quality, same service, no minimum order discrimination.
Hundreds of Sizes
A complete range of structural steel types, grades, and dimensions always in ready stock across 22+ product lines. If it's steel, we have it.
Multiple Payment Modes
Pay the way you prefer — Cash, UPI, Debit/Credit Cards, Net Banking, Cheque/DD, or PhonePe. We've made transactions easy so you can focus on your project.

Our Story

A LEGACY BUILT IN STEEL

Raj Iron Shop was established in February 2003 in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh — a city that breathes industry. For over two decades, we have been the backbone of construction projects, manufacturing units, and infrastructure development across the region.

As a proprietorship firm registered under GST (GSTIN: 09AISPG7202J1ZZ), we operate as a Manufacturer, Wholesaler, Retailer, and Supplier of premium Mild Steel and Iron products — serving clients who demand reliability above all else.

Our primary location at Pratapganj, Fazalganj, Shastri Nagar, Kanpur, and our warehouse at Gadarian Purwa ensure we have the capacity to serve both bulk industrial orders and individual project requirements.

2003 Founded
2017 GST Registered
2024 Serving 1000s
Shop Owner / Proprietor
